article.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
article.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

headline: BIS Flags Stablecoins as $130bn Systemic Risk

article.title: BIS warns stablecoins risk fragmenting global financial system
article.summary: The Basel-based institution said that private digital tokens fall short of the requirements for sound money and urged policymakers to accelerate work on tokenized forms of central bank and commercial bank money.

article.title: Oil Rises as US, Iran Set to Halt Attacks Following Flare-Up
article.summary: Oil rose after a report that the US and Iran have agreed to stop attacking each other, following a flare-up that saw a supertanker carrying Qatari crude hit near the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: US Futures Surge 1.2% on Peace Talks Revival

article.title: US Futures Climb on Reports Peace Talks to Resume: Markets Wrap
article.summary: US equity futures climbed after reports that the US and Iran stepped back from an escalation in hostilities that had threatened the fragile ceasefire underpinning peace talks.

headline: BIS Warns Stablecoins Fail as Money

article.summary: The Bank for International Settlements argued in its annual report that stablecoins still fall short of money on singleness, elasticity and integrity.
